section_intro_headline: You Deserve More Than a Two-Week Vacation
hero_subheadline: You have spent years taking care of everyone else. Now it is time to take care of yourself. I help burned-out nurses and healthcare professionals take sabbaticals, extended vacations, and make the move to the Dominican Republic.
free_community_description: Join nurses and healthcare workers exploring the Dominican Republic.  Connect, ask questions, and get free resources.
dfy_description: You bring the vision. Ricardo and I bring the plan. We handle everything from strategy to on-the-ground guidance so your transition is smooth, safe, and stress-free.
courses_description: Step-by-step guides covering visas, cost of living, neighborhoods, healthcare access, and everything you need to make an informed decision about your sabbatical or relocation.
hero_headline: Who Is Taking Care of You?
section_intro_text: Burnout is not a personality flaw. It is a system problem. And the system is not going to fix itself. I know because I lived it for 30 years. What changed everything for me was giving myself permission to step away — not forever, just long enough to remember who I was before the shifts, the short staffing, and the emotional weight.
stat_3_label: Years living in the Dominican Republic
